common.name: Name
common.boatsUnavailable: We couldn’t load boats right now. Please try again in a moment.
common.networkUnavailable: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

calendar.title: Boat calendar
calendar.ownerHint: Lock specific dates or weekdays to stop new bookings. Pending requests do not block the day until accepted.
calendar.pickerHint: Green: confirmed trip. Amber: pending request (another guest may still book). Red: blocked by owner.
calendar.banhistaMinLeadHint: Minimum lead time: {{days}} calendar days from today — today and tomorrow cannot be selected.
calendar.panelHint: View bookings and locks. To edit locks, open the boat editor.

theme.toggle: Switch between light and dark mode

menu.title: Settings
menu.roleAreaHint: As an owner, you can browse boats or manage your dashboard.

explorar.title: Explore
explorar.searchLocationAria: Search by location, boat name or type
explorar.logoutConfirm: You have been logged out. Click OK to go to the home screen or Cancel to stay on Explore.
explorar.pageIntro: Use the bar at the top, then browse by rating, price, and vessel type.
explorar.sectionBestPriceHint: Strong value picks — fair prices for an unforgettable day on the water.
explorar.sectionByTypeHint: Pick the style of outing that fits you.
explorar.stripScrollHint: Swipe sideways to see more boats.
explorar.noHighRating: No boats rated above 4.5 right now.
explorar.allAngrensesInIdealList: Highly rated boats (above 4.5) are already shown in the list above.
explorar.fixLoadAbove: When loading works again, this section will appear here.
explorar.includedCheckboxHint: Check the items the trip must include. Only boats that include all selected items are shown.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitleRenter: Owner area — open your booking dashboard.
login.failUnavailable: Service unavailable. Try again shortly or check that the API is running.
login.failNetwork: Could not reach the server. Check your connection or that the API is running (e.g. npm run dev:server).
login.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.

signup.title: Sign up
signup.subtitle: Choose your profile and get started.
signup.locatarioHint: I list boats and receive bookings

detalhes.availabilityHint: See when the boat is free or busy. Unavailable: owner lock or weekday closure. Green: confirmed trip. Amber: booking request still pending.
detalhes.jetSkiIntro: Offered by the owner. Can be added to the trip total when booking.

reservar.title: Book
reservar.bbqDesc: Meat, sausage, garlic bread, extra charcoal and seasonings
reservar.jetSkiDesc: Extra fee set by the owner; added to the trip price.
reservar.toastCpf: Invalid CPF. Check and try again.
reservar.toastPhone: Invalid phone. Use area code + number.
reservar.toastDate: Choose the trip date on the calendar.
reservar.toastDateMinLead: The trip date must be at least two days after today (today and tomorrow are not available).
reservar.tripDateHint: Green: confirmed. Amber: pending request (another guest). Red: blocked by owner.
reservar.tripDateMinLead: Bookings require at least 2 days’ notice: you cannot choose today or tomorrow.
reservar.toastRoute: Select at least one route stop.
reservar.routeStopsHint: Choose the stops you want. Review below before paying.
reservar.pickRouteVariant: This boat offers more than one route — pick one:
reservar.toastPayOk: Payment created! Opening Mercado Pago checkout…
reservar.waIntro: Hi! I'd like to confirm a booking:
reservar.embarkToArrange: Boarding time and/or location to be arranged with the owner.
reservar.embarkLocationToArrange: Boarding location to be arranged with the owner.
reservar.embarkTimeToArrange: Boarding time to be arranged with the owner.
reservar.rescheduleNoticeAfterAccept: After the owner accepts your booking, changing the trip date (reschedule) is only allowed with a mandatory justification: selected reason, title, descriptive text, and optional image attachments.

marinheiro.title: Owner dashboard
marinheiro.needRole: You must be signed in as {{role}} to see bookings.
marinheiro.reservationsButtonTitle: Mark updates as seen and jump to pending requests
marinheiro.bookingsHubHint: The Bookings button highlights when the list changed (new or updated reservation). The red count is pending approvals. Use Refresh to fetch updates.
marinheiro.stepsHint: Fill in step by step. Star ratings come from users and are not edited here.
marinheiro.routesHint: Each line is one route: stops separated by commas. The button below adds another full route. The app estimates duration.
marinheiro.embarkLocationsHint: Comma-separated. If empty, guests see “location TBD”.
marinheiro.embarkTimesHint: HH:MM, comma-separated (e.g. 08:00, 10:30). If empty, time TBD.
marinheiro.routePhotosDisclaimer: I confirm I own the rights to these images or have valid permission to use them in this listing.
marinheiro.newBoatBlocked: Fill required fields: name, location, type, description, price, dimensions, at least one boat photo, and accept image terms if uploading route photos. If offering a jet ski, add price, photos, and documentation.
marinheiro.toastAmenitiesFail: Boat saved but inclusions could not be stored.
marinheiro.rateRenterHint: How was the experience with this guest? Optional short comment.
marinheiro.deleteBoatLead: Are you sure you want to delete the boat “{{name}}”?
marinheiro.deleteBoatDocsNote: Documents uploaded for this boat or on your owner profile may be kept on file by the platform after the listing is removed.
marinheiro.noBoats: No boats linked to your account.
marinheiro.editRatingHint: Ratings are generated by users after bookings.
marinheiro.jetSkiHint: If enabled, set the extra price, upload at least one photo and the jet ski documentation. Guests can add it to the booking total.
marinheiro.jetSkiToastPrice: Set the jet ski price (minimum R$1.00).
marinheiro.jetSkiToastPhotos: Upload at least one jet ski photo.
marinheiro.jetSkiToastDoc: Provide jet ski documentation (file or URL).
marinheiro.logoutConfirm: You have been logged out. Click OK to go home or Cancel to stay on Explore.

conta.title: My account
conta.noFavorites: You have not favorited any boats yet.
conta.helpSectionDesc: Quick tips for testing login, favorites, bookings and owner dashboard.
conta.riskDesc: Deleting your account removes access and cannot be undone.
conta.logoutConfirm: You have been logged out. Click OK to go home or Cancel to stay on Explore.
conta.deleteConfirm: Delete your account? This cannot be undone.

reservasConta.title: My bookings
reservasConta.saveOk: Booking updated. The owner must accept again.
reservasConta.editHint: If you change an accepted booking, it becomes pending for the owner again.
reservasConta.rateBoatHint: How were the boat and the trip? Your rating helps other guests.
reservasConta.cancelConfirm: Cancel this booking? This cannot be undone.
reservasConta.rescheduleSectionHint: If you change the trip date, you must state the reason and describe the situation. The owner will see this when reconfirming.
reservasConta.rescheduleNotePh: Explain the context in as much detail as needed.
reservasConta.rescheduleAttachmentsHint: Up to 8 images (e.g. weather bulletin, notice).
reservasConta.arriveEarlyNotice: Booking confirmed: please arrive at the boarding point ahead of the time agreed with the owner (we suggest at least 15–20 minutes early).

ajudaTeste.title: Testing help
ajudaTeste.l1: Sign in as guest and as owner.
ajudaTeste.l2: Favorite/unfavorite a boat and reload to verify persistence.
ajudaTeste.l3: Create a booking as guest and accept/decline in owner dashboard.
ajudaTeste.l4: Edit a boat in owner dashboard and confirm on Explore.
ajudaTeste.demoGuest: Guest: create an account on sign up.

recuperar.title: Forgot password
recuperar.subtitle: Enter your account email. If it exists, you can reset your password via the link.
recuperar.tip: Tip: with the API running locally, check the Node server terminal after sending — the full reset link is printed there (valid for 1 hour).
recuperar.toastOk: If that email is registered, we generated a recovery link. In development, the link appears in the API terminal.

redefinir.invalidHint: Request a new link from "Forgot password" on the sign-in screen.
redefinir.newPassSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
redefinir.toastShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
redefinir.toastOk: Password changed. Sign in with the new password.

boatRoutes.title: Suggested itineraries
boatRoutes.subtitle: Sample island-hopping routes for this trip.
boatRoutes.hint: Estimated sea route; may follow coast and islands.
